response.overview: Suwardi (Suwardi Becak Lawu), a police officer with the rank of Assistant Commissioner, is transferred from Jakarta to his hometown in Garut to carry out a mission for the government’s Task Force on Human Trafficking (Satgas TPPO) to combat kidnapping and human trafficking. The joy of his return home turns into a nightmare when his own niece, Lilis (Cinta Kharisma), is kidnapped by a human trafficking ringleader. Overcome by deep guilt and in conflict with Asep (Iyang Darmawan), Lilis’s father, Suwardi forms a special task force to dismantle the largest human trafficking network in West Java, led by Rando (Macho Hungan). One ambush after another drags Suwardi into an escalating vortex of fistfights and shootouts until a shocking truth about Rando’s true identity is revealed.
response.title: Leave No One Behind
